prompt: You are building a WhatsApp-based B2B messaging product for small business owners. Create a production launch checklist covering the critical items that must be in place before going live, focusing on observability, API integration pitfalls, and common failure modes.
baselineResponse:
# WhatsApp B2B Messaging Product - Production Launch Checklist

## 🔍 Observability & Monitoring

### Core Metrics & Dashboards
- [ ] **Message throughput metrics** (sent/delivered/failed per minute/hour)
- [ ] **API response time monitoring** (p50, p95, p99 latencies)
- [ ] **Error rate tracking** by endpoint and error type
- [ ] **Queue depth monitoring** for message processing
- [ ] **Rate limiting metrics** and threshold alerts
- [ ] **Business metrics dashboard** (active customers, message volume trends)
- [ ] **Cost monitoring** (WhatsApp API charges, infrastructure costs)

### Alerting System
- [ ] **Critical path alerts** (message delivery failures >5%)
- [ ] **API integration health** alerts (WhatsApp Business API connectivity)
- [ ] **Database performance** alerts (connection pool, query timeouts)
- [ ] **Infrastructure alerts** (CPU, memory, disk usage)
- [ ] **Rate limit approaching** warnings (80% of WhatsApp limits)
- [ ] **Webhook failure** alerts
- [ ] **On-call rotation** and escalation procedures defined

### Logging & Tracing
- [ ] **Structured logging** with correlation IDs across all services
- [ ] **Message lifecycle tracking** (queued → processing → sent → delivered)
- [ ] **User action audit trails** for compliance
- [ ] **Error context logging** (user ID, business ID, message content hash)
- [ ] **Performance profiling** enabled for critical paths
- [ ] **Log retention policy** defined and implemented

## 🔌 WhatsApp API Integration

### Authentication & Security
- [ ] **WhatsApp Business Account** properly configured and verified
- [ ] **API credentials** securely stored (no hardcoded tokens)
- [ ] **Webhook verification** implemented and tested
- [ ] **Token refresh mechanism** automated
- [ ] **IP whitelisting** configured if required
- [ ] **Certificate pinning** for API calls

### Rate Limiting & Quotas
- [ ] **Message template limits** tracked and enforced
- [ ] **Business-initiated conversation limits** monitored
- [ ] **Rate limiting implementation** with exponential backoff
- [ ] **Queue management** for burst handling
- [ ] **Tier limits understood** (messaging limits per phone number)
- [ ] **Upgrade path planned** for higher tiers

### Message Handling
- [ ] **Template message approval** process documented
- [ ] **Message format validation** before API calls
- [ ] **Media upload handling** with size/type restrictions
- [ ] **Message status webhook** processing
- [ ] **Delivery receipt handling** and user notification
- [ ] **Failed message retry logic** with circuit breakers

### Webhook Management
- [ ] **Webhook endpoint security** (signature verification)
- [ ] **Idempotency handling** for duplicate webhooks
- [ ] **Webhook timeout handling** (must respond within 20 seconds)
- [ ] **Status callback processing** (sent, delivered, read, failed)
- [ ] **Incoming message routing** to correct business accounts
- [ ] **Webhook failure recovery** mechanism

## ⚠️ Common Failure Modes & Safeguards

### Message Delivery Failures
- [ ] **Template rejection handling** (user-friendly error messages)
- [ ] **Invalid phone number detection** and validation
- [ ] **Opt-out/block detection** and customer list cleanup
- [ ] **Network timeout handling** with retries
- [ ] **API deprecation monitoring** and migration plans
- [ ] **Fallback communication channels** (email notifications)

### Scalability & Performance
- [ ] **Database connection pooling** configured properly
- [ ] **Message queue sizing** for peak loads
- [ ] **Auto-scaling policies** defined and tested
- [ ] **Cache warming** strategies for cold starts
- [ ] **Database query optimization** and indexing
- [ ] **CDN configuration** for media content

### Data & Compliance
- [ ] **Data encryption** at rest and in transit
- [ ] **GDPR compliance** (right to deletion, data portability)
- [ ] **Message content retention** policies
- [ ] **Audit logging** for compliance requirements
- [ ] **Backup and disaster recovery** procedures
- [ ] **Cross-border data transfer** compliance

### Business Logic Failures
- [ ] **Duplicate message prevention** mechanisms
- [ ] **Template variable validation** (preventing injection)
- [ ] **Business account isolation** (no cross-contamination)
- [ ] **Permission validation** (user access to business accounts)
- [ ] **Billing integration** error handling
- [ ] **Account suspension handling** graceful degradation

## 🏗️ Infrastructure & Deployment

### Pre-deployment Testing
- [ ] **Load testing** with realistic message volumes
- [ ] **Integration testing** with WhatsApp sandbox
- [ ] **Chaos engineering** tests (dependency failures)
- [ ] **Database migration** tested in staging
- [ ] **Rollback procedures** documented and tested
- [ ] **Feature flag system** for gradual rollout

### Production Environment
- [ ] **Environment variables** properly configured
- [ ] **Secrets management** system in place
- [ ] **SSL certificates** valid and auto-renewing
- [ ] **Domain configuration** and DNS settings
- [ ] **Firewall rules** and security groups configured
- [ ] **Backup systems** automated and tested

### Deployment Pipeline
- [ ] **CI/CD pipeline** with automated testing
- [ ] **Blue-green deployment** capability
- [ ] **Health checks** implemented for all services
- [ ] **Database migration** automation
- [ ] **Configuration management** version controlled
- [ ] **Deployment notifications** to team channels

## 🚨 Emergency Procedures

### Incident Response
- [ ] **Runbook** for common issues documented
- [ ] **Emergency contacts** list maintained
- [ ] **Status page** integration for customer communication
- [ ] **Data breach response** plan defined
- [ ] **Service degradation** communication templates
- [ ] **Post-incident review** process established

### Business Continuity
- [ ] **Message queue persistence** during outages
- [ ] **Graceful degradation** when WhatsApp API is down
- [ ] **Customer notification** system for service issues
- [ ] **Data backup verification** procedures
- [ ] **Alternative communication** channels ready
- [ ] **Vendor support** contact information accessible

## ✅ Go-Live Prerequisites

### Final Checks
- [ ] **All monitoring dashboards** accessible to team
- [ ] **Alert routing** verified with test alerts
- [ ] **Documentation** updated and team trained
- [ ] **Customer support** procedures documented
- [ ] **Legal terms** and privacy policy published
- [ ] **Pricing and billing** system fully functional
- [ ] **User onboarding flow** tested end-to-end
- [ ] **Performance benchmarks** established
- [ ] **Security audit** completed
- [ ] **Stakeholder sign-off** obtained

### Launch Day Preparation
- [ ] **Team availability** confirmed for launch window
- [ ] **Communication plan** for customers and stakeholders
- [ ] **Metrics baseline** established
- [ ] **Feature flags** configured for controlled rollout
- [ ] **Emergency shutdown** procedure ready
- [ ] **Success criteria** defined and measurable

---

*Remember: Start with a limited beta group, monitor closely, and scale gradually. WhatsApp's business policies are strict, so ensure compliance at every step.*
augmentedResponse:
# WhatsApp B2B Messaging Product: Production Launch Checklist

## Pre-Launch Critical Items

### 🔍 Observability & Logging
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **Inbound webhook logging** - Log every message received (sender, timestamp, message type, content hash)
- [ ] **Outbound API call logging** - Log every send attempt (recipient, message type, success/failure, error codes, response time)
- [ ] **Database operation logging** - Log business-critical writes (contact creation, message history, billing events)
- [ ] **Correlation IDs** - Trace single user interactions end-to-end across all services
- [ ] **Structured logging format** - JSON logs with consistent field names for easy querying
- [ ] **Log aggregation** - Centralized logging system accessible to support team
- [ ] **Error alerting** - Real-time notifications for API failures, webhook timeouts, rate limit hits

### 📱 WhatsApp Business API Integration
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **Webhook verification** - Properly validate Meta's webhook signatures
- [ ] **Rate limit handling** - Implement exponential backoff for 429 responses
- [ ] **Message template approval** - All template messages approved by Meta before launch
- [ ] **Phone number verification** - Business phone number fully verified and display name set
- [ ] **Webhook URL security** - HTTPS endpoint with valid SSL certificate
- [ ] **Business verification status** - WhatsApp Business Account verified (green checkmark)
- [ ] **Messaging limits understood** - Know your current tier limits (1K/day, 10K/day, etc.)

### 🛡️ Error Handling & Resilience
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **Webhook retry logic** - Handle temporary failures gracefully, avoid duplicate processing
- [ ] **API timeout handling** - Set reasonable timeouts for WhatsApp API calls (30s recommended)
- [ ] **Graceful degradation** - App remains functional if WhatsApp API is temporarily down
- [ ] **Invalid phone number handling** - Validate numbers before attempting to send
- [ ] **Message delivery failure handling** - Log and alert on persistent delivery failures
- [ ] **Webhook payload validation** - Reject malformed or unexpected webhook data

### 🔐 Security & Compliance
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **Customer data encryption** - Encrypt sensitive customer data at rest
- [ ] **Webhook endpoint protection** - Rate limiting and DDoS protection
- [ ] **Access token security** - WhatsApp API tokens stored in secure environment variables
- [ ] **Data retention policy** - Clear policy on how long messages/customer data is stored
- [ ] **GDPR compliance** - Data deletion mechanisms if operating in EU
- [ ] **Audit logging** - Log admin actions and configuration changes

### 📊 Monitoring & Alerting
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **Message delivery rate monitoring** - Alert if delivery success rate drops below threshold
- [ ] **API response time monitoring** - Track WhatsApp API performance
- [ ] **Webhook health monitoring** - Alert if webhook endpoint becomes unreachable
- [ ] **Database performance monitoring** - Query performance and connection pool health
- [ ] **Business metrics dashboard** - Messages sent/received, active conversations, customer growth

### 🧪 Testing & Validation
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **End-to-end message flow tested** - Complete customer journey from first message to resolution
- [ ] **Template message testing** - All approved templates tested with real phone numbers
- [ ] **Error scenario testing** - Test behavior with invalid numbers, rate limits, API downtime
- [ ] **Load testing** - Webhook endpoint tested under expected message volume
- [ ] **Multi-device testing** - Tested on various WhatsApp clients (iOS, Android, Web, Business)

### 💼 Business Continuity
**Status: [ ] Complete**

- [ ] **Support process defined** - Clear escalation path for customer issues
- [ ] **WhatsApp policy compliance** - Familiar with Commerce Policy and Messaging Policy
- [ ] **Backup communication channel** - Alternative way to reach customers if WhatsApp fails
- [ ] **Billing/usage tracking** - Monitor API usage to avoid surprise charges
- [ ] **Emergency contact list** - Key personnel for production issues

## Common Failure Modes to Verify Against

### Message Delivery Issues
- [ ] **Silent failures logged** - WhatsApp API may return 200 but message doesn't deliver
- [ ] **Customer blocked bot** - Handle and log when customers block your business number
- [ ] **Template violations** - Monitor for template rejections and policy violations

### API Integration Pitfalls
- [ ] **Webhook flooding** - Prevent infinite loops from webhook retries
- [ ] **Duplicate message handling** - Idempotency for webhook processing
- [ ] **Media upload failures** - Proper handling when sending images/documents fails

### Business Number Exposure
- [ ] **Dedicated business SIM** - Use separate SIM card, not personal number (will receive increased business spam)
- [ ] **Customer number protection** - Customer numbers are NOT exposed to spam (only your business number is)

## Launch Day Checklist

- [ ] **All monitoring systems active**
- [ ] **Support team briefed and available**
- [ ] **Rollback plan documented and tested**
- [ ] **Initial customer cohort identified** (start small)
- [ ] **Emergency shutdown procedure** ready if needed

## Post-Launch Monitoring (First 48 Hours)

- [ ] **Message delivery rates** - Should be >95% for valid numbers
- [ ] **API response times** - WhatsApp API calls <5 seconds average
- [ ] **Webhook processing times** - <2 seconds for typical message processing
- [ ] **Customer support tickets** - Monitor for delivery complaints
- [ ] **Error log review** - Daily review of error patterns

---

**Critical Success Metric**: Can you trace a failed message delivery from customer complaint back to the exact API call and error? If not, your logging is insufficient for production.

judgeResult.explanation: Response 2 demonstrates deeper WhatsApp-specific domain knowledge with more accurate technical details like webhook signature verification, Meta's specific requirements, and realistic performance benchmarks, while maintaining better actionability through clearer prioritization and concrete success metrics.
